# copick logical

*Perform logical operations on copick objects.*

## Usage

```bash
copick logical [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

## Description

Commands in this group perform boolean operations, distance-based filtering,
and point inclusion/exclusion across meshes, segmentations, and picks.
Subcommands are contributed by installed plugins.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`clipmesh`](clipmesh.md) | Limit mesh vertices within distance of a reference surface. |
| [`clippicks`](clippicks.md) | Limit picks to those within distance of a reference surface. |
| [`clipseg`](clipseg.md) | Limit segmentation voxels by distance to a reference. |
| [`enclosed`](enclosed.md) | Remove enclosed components from a segmentation. |
| [`meshop`](meshop.md) | Perform boolean operations between meshes. |
| [`picksin`](picksin.md) | Filter picks to include only those inside a reference volume. |
| [`picksout`](picksout.md) | Filter picks to exclude those inside a reference volume. |
| [`segop`](segop.md) | Perform boolean operations between segmentations. |
